◎简　　介  

　　Written by Tony Grounds and made by BBC Drama Production for BBC One, Our Girl will return to our screens with Two Section on an African mission, with a new female medic at their centre. Michelle Keegan will play Corporal Georgie Lane, a brilliant and committed soldier who loves the adrenaline and adventure of her job.Georgie will have to earn the love and trust of her fellow ...
